still_prompt: Large warm African American family gathering outdoors at a family reunion, multiple generations from young children to great-grandparents, joyful and proud expressions, string lights overhead, golden sunset light filtering through old oak trees, long tables with soul food, watermelon, macaroni and cheese, potato salad, warm earth tones, cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, lush green grass
video_prompt: Gentle cinematic camera drift across the joyful family reunion scene, string lights swaying softly in the warm breeze, golden hour light shifting through oak tree leaves, family members laughing and embracing in the background, warm and celebratory atmosphere

prompt: African American family — grandmother, adult children, and grandchildren — sitting together around a dining room table covered in old black and white photographs and documents, warm lamp light, engaged and smiling, discovering family history together, photorealistic, warm tones

Elegant hardcover genealogy book with a family tree illustration on the cover, warm amber and mahogany tones, placed on a wooden table with reading glasses and an heirloom ring nearby, soft studio lighting, book open showing family photos and handwritten notes, photorealistic product photography

Black family arriving at a beautiful outdoor event venue at dusk, string lights illuminating the space, tables set for a celebration, people embracing and greeting each other, warm golden and twinkling light, festive and joyful reunion atmosphere, photorealistic
